subcodes.first_line: O God, my God! With utter lowliness and fervour, humility and devotion, I implore Thee with my tongue and my heart
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انی بکل تضرع و توجه و تذلل و تبتل اناجیک بلسانی و جنانی و روحی و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
